parameters.name: EntityType
parameters.label: Entity Type
parameters.query:
let Types = VectraEntities | where ['Last Updated'] {timerange} | distinct Type | project Type
| where isnotempty(Type)
| distinct Type;
Types
| extend splitted_entity_type = split(Type, "_")
| mv-expand splitted_entity_type
| extend cap = toupper(substring(splitted_entity_type,0,1)), rest_string = substring(splitted_entity_type,1)
| extend joined_str = strcat(cap,rest_string)
| distinct joined_str, Type
| summarize joined_array = make_list(tostring(joined_str)) by Type
| extend capitalized_Category = strcat_array(joined_array, " ")
| distinct Type, capitalized_Category
| sort by capitalized_Category asc

content.query:
let _DataSourceLookup =
    VectraDetectionsCombined
    | where ["Change Type"] in ("new", "append")
    | where isnotempty(["Data Source Type"])
    | summarize arg_max(['Last Updated'], ["Data Source Type"]) by ['Entity ID']
    | project _LookupEntityId = ['Entity ID'], _DetectedDST = ["Data Source Type"];
VectraEntities
| where ['Last Updated'] {timerange}
| summarize arg_max(['Last Updated'], *) by ['Entity ID'], Type
| where ('*' in ({View}) or ["Is Prioritized"] in ({View})) and ('*' in ({EntityType}) or Type in ({EntityType}))
| lookup kind=leftouter (_DataSourceLookup) on $left.['Entity ID'] == $right._LookupEntityId
| extend _at = tostring(["Account Type"])
| extend _dstFromAccount = case(
    Type == "account" and (_at has "o365" or _at has "entra_principal" or _at has "entra_id"), "EntraID",
    Type == "account" and _at has "azure", "Azure",
    Type == "account" and _at has "aws", "AWS",
    ""
)
| extend _dstFromDetection = iff(isnotempty(_DetectedDST), case(
    _DetectedDST == "aws", "AWS",
    _DetectedDST == "o365", "EntraID",
    _DetectedDST == "azure-cp", "Azure",
    tolower(tostring(_DetectedDST)) in ("network", "nwi", "vectra"), "Network",
    ""
), "")
| extend _dstFromName = case(
    Name startswith "AWS", "AWS",
    Name startswith "SAML", "AWS",
    Name startswith "O365", "EntraID",
    Name startswith "M365", "EntraID",
    Name startswith "Azure", "Azure",
    ""
)
| extend ['Data Source Type'] = case(
    isnotempty(_dstFromAccount), _dstFromAccount,
    isnotempty(_dstFromDetection), _dstFromDetection,
    isnotempty(_dstFromName), _dstFromName,
    "Network"
)
| project-away _DetectedDST, _at, _dstFromAccount, _dstFromDetection, _dstFromName
| where ('*' in ({DataSource}) or ['Data Source Type'] in ({DataSource}))
| extend priority = case(
    ['Is Prioritized'] == true, "Prioritized",
    ['Is Prioritized'] == false, "Not Prioritized",
    "Unknown"
)
| summarize count() by priority
| order by priority desc
content.title: Entity Count by Priority

content.query:
let _DataSourceLookup =
    VectraDetectionsCombined
    | where ["Change Type"] in ("new", "append")
    | where isnotempty(["Data Source Type"])
    | summarize arg_max(['Last Updated'], ["Data Source Type"]) by ['Entity ID']
    | project _LookupEntityId = ['Entity ID'], _DetectedDST = ["Data Source Type"];
VectraEntities
| where ['Last Updated'] {timerange} 
| summarize arg_max(['Last Updated'], *) by ['Entity ID'], Type
| where ('*' in ({View}) or ["Is Prioritized"] in ({View})) and ('*' in ({EntityType}) or Type in ({EntityType}))
| lookup kind=leftouter (_DataSourceLookup) on $left.['Entity ID'] == $right._LookupEntityId
| extend _at = tostring(["Account Type"])
| extend _dstFromAccount = case(
    Type == "account" and (_at has "o365" or _at has "entra_principal" or _at has "entra_id"), "EntraID",
    Type == "account" and _at has "azure", "Azure",
    Type == "account" and _at has "aws", "AWS",
    ""
)
| extend _dstFromDetection = iff(isnotempty(_DetectedDST), case(
    _DetectedDST == "aws", "AWS",
    _DetectedDST == "o365", "EntraID",
    _DetectedDST == "azure-cp", "Azure",
    tolower(tostring(_DetectedDST)) in ("network", "nwi", "vectra"), "Network",
    ""
), "")
| extend _dstFromName = case(
    Name startswith "AWS", "AWS",
    Name startswith "SAML", "AWS",
    Name startswith "O365", "EntraID",
    Name startswith "M365", "EntraID",
    Name startswith "Azure", "Azure",
    ""
)
| extend ['Data Source Type'] = case(
    isnotempty(_dstFromAccount), _dstFromAccount,
    isnotempty(_dstFromDetection), _dstFromDetection,
    isnotempty(_dstFromName), _dstFromName,
    "Network"
)
| project-away _DetectedDST, _at, _dstFromAccount, _dstFromDetection, _dstFromName
| extend ['Entity Name'] = extract("^(AWS:|SAML:|O365:|M365:|Azure:)?(.*)$",2, Name)
| where ('*' in ({DataSource}) or ['Data Source Type'] in ({DataSource}))
| sort by ['Urgency Score'] desc, Importance desc
| extend Importance = case(
    Importance == 0, "Low",
    Importance == 1, "Medium",
    Importance == 2, "High",
    "Unknown"
), Velocity = case(
    Velocity == 0, "Low",
    Velocity == 1, "Medium",
    Velocity == 2, "High",
    "Unknown"
),
['Vectra Pivot']           = replace_string(replace_string(tostring(['Vectra Pivot']), "api/v3.4/", ""), "api/v3.5/", "")
| project ['Urgency Score'], ['Attack Rating'], ['Entity Name'], ['Vectra Pivot'], Prioritized = ['Is Prioritized'], ['Data Source Type'], Importance, Velocity, ['Last Updated']
content.title: Entity View

content.json: 💡 _Click on a row in the above Entity View grid to view more details_

content.query:
let _entity =
    VectraEntities
    | extend ['Vectra Pivot']           = replace_string(replace_string(tostring(['Vectra Pivot']), "api/v3.4/", ""), "api/v3.5/", "")
    | where ['Vectra Pivot'] == "{P_deep_url}" or ['Vectra Pivot'] startswith strcat("{P_deep_url}", "?")
    | summarize arg_max(['Last Updated'], *) by ['Entity ID'];
let _DataSourceLookup =
    VectraDetectionsCombined
    | where ["Change Type"] in ("new", "append")
    | where isnotempty(["Data Source Type"])
    | join kind=inner (_entity | project ['Entity ID']) on $left.['Entity ID'] == $right.['Entity ID']
    | summarize arg_max(['Last Updated'], ["Data Source Type"]) by ['Entity ID']
    | project _LookupEntityId = ['Entity ID'], _DetectedDST = ["Data Source Type"];
_entity
| lookup kind=leftouter (_DataSourceLookup) on $left.['Entity ID'] == $right._LookupEntityId
| extend _at = tostring(["Account Type"])
| extend _dstFromAccount = case(
    Type == "account" and (_at has "o365" or _at has "entra_principal" or _at has "entra_id"), "EntraID",
    Type == "account" and _at has "azure", "Azure",
    Type == "account" and _at has "aws", "AWS",
    ""
)
| extend _dstFromDetection = iff(isnotempty(_DetectedDST), case(
    _DetectedDST == "aws", "AWS",
    _DetectedDST == "o365", "EntraID",
    _DetectedDST == "azure-cp", "Azure",
    tolower(tostring(_DetectedDST)) in ("network", "nwi", "vectra"), "Network",
    ""
), "")
| extend _dstFromName = case(
    Name startswith "AWS", "AWS",
    Name startswith "SAML", "AWS",
    Name startswith "O365", "EntraID",
    Name startswith "M365", "EntraID",
    Name startswith "Azure", "Azure",
    ""
)
| extend ['Data Source'] = case(
    isnotempty(_dstFromAccount), _dstFromAccount,
    isnotempty(_dstFromDetection), _dstFromDetection,
    isnotempty(_dstFromName), _dstFromName,
    "Network"
)
| project-away _DetectedDST, _at, _dstFromAccount, _dstFromDetection, _dstFromName
| extend ['Entity Name'] = extract("^(AWS:|SAML:|O365:|M365:|Azure:)?(.*)$", 2, Name)
| where ('*' in ({DataSource}) or ['Data Source'] in ({DataSource}))
| project
    ['Entity ID'],
    ['Entity Name'],
    ['Urgency Score'],
    ['Data Source'],
    ['Type'] = Type,
    ['State'] = State,
    ['IP'] = ["IP Address"],
    ['Is Prioritized'],
    ['Severity'] = Severity,
    ['Importance'] = Importance,
    ['Attack Profile'],
    ['Breadth Contrib'],
    ['Velocity'] = Velocity,
    ['Attack Rating'],
    ['Tags'] = Tags,
    ['Assigned To'] = ["Assigned To"],
    ['Vectra Pivot'],
    ['Last Updated']
content.title: Selected Entity View data

content.query:
let _entity =
    VectraEntities
    | extend ['Vectra Pivot']           = replace_string(replace_string(tostring(['Vectra Pivot']), "api/v3.4/", ""), "api/v3.5/", "")
    | where ['Vectra Pivot'] == "{P_deep_url}" or ['Vectra Pivot'] startswith strcat("{P_deep_url}", "?")
    | summarize arg_max(['Last Updated'], *) by ['Entity ID']
    | project sel_entity_id = ['Entity ID'];
VectraDetectionsCombined
| where ['Last Updated'] > ago(90d)
| join kind=inner _entity on $left.['Entity ID'] == $right.sel_entity_id
| summarize arg_max(['Last Updated'], *) by ['Detection ID']
| project ['Detection ID'], ['D Type Vname'], ['Detection Category'], status=["Investigation Status"], ['Unresolved Priority'], ['Last Updated'], ['Vectra Pivot']
| order by ['Last Updated'] desc
content.title: Detection List

content.json: 💡 _Click on a row in the above Detection List grid to view more details_

content.query:
VectraDetectionsCombined
| where ['Last Updated'] > ago(90d) and (URL == '{P_deep_url}' or URL startswith strcat('{P_deep_url}', '?'))
| where ['Detection ID'] == '{P_detection_id}'
| where ["Change Type"] in ("new", "append")
| summarize arg_max(['Last Updated'], *) by ['Detection ID']
| extend ['Detection Category'] = case(['Detection Category']=="botnet","Botnet",['Detection Category']=="command_and_control","Command and Control",['Detection Category']=="reconnaissance","Reconnaissance",['Detection Category']=="lateral_movement","Lateral Movement",['Detection Category']=="exfiltration","Exfiltration","Unknown")
| extend ["Detection Details"] = parse_json(["Detection Details"])[0]
| extend ["Detection Details"] = case(isnotempty(["Detection Details"]), ["Detection Details"], "Details too large to display.")
| extend ["Source Host"] = parse_json(["Source Host"])[0]
| extend ["Grouped Details"] = parse_json(["Grouped Details"])[0]
| extend Summary = parse_json(Summary)[0]
| extend Details = parse_json(["Details"])[0]
| project ID, ['Detection Category'], ['Is Triaged'], Behavior=["Detection Name"], ["Detection ID"], ["Vectra Pivot"], ["Entity ID"], URL, ["Entity UID"], ["Last Updated"], ["Detection Details"], ["Details"], Severity, ['Source IP'], ["Normal Domains"], ["Is Targeting Key Asset"], ["Source Host"], Summary, ["Grouped Details"]
content.title: Selected Detection List Data

content.json: 📝 ***Refresh the web page to fetch details of recently collected events***

parameters.name: DetectionType
parameters.label: Behavior
parameters.query:
VectraDetectionsCombined
| where ['Last Updated'] {TimeRange}
| where ["Change Type"] in ("new", "append")
| summarize arg_max(['Last Updated'],*) by ['Detection ID']
| extend _uid_pfx = tostring(split(['Entity UID'],":")[0])
| extend _dst = case(_uid_pfx startswith "AWS", "AWS", _uid_pfx startswith "SAML", "AWS", _uid_pfx startswith "O365", "EntraID", _uid_pfx startswith "M365", "EntraID", _uid_pfx startswith "Azure", "Azure", "Network")
| where ('*' in ({DataSource}) or _dst in ({DataSource})) and ('*' in ({DetectionCategory}) or ['Detection Category'] in ({DetectionCategory}))
| distinct ['Detection Name']
| sort by ['Detection Name'] asc

parameters.name: Mitre
parameters.query:
VectraDetectionsCombined
| where ['Last Updated'] {TimeRange}
| where ["Change Type"] in ("new", "append")
| extend _MitreArr = case(isnull(Mitre), dynamic([]), gettype(Mitre) in ("array", "dynamic"), Mitre, pack_array(Mitre))
| mv-expand _MitreArr
| extend Mitre = tostring(_MitreArr)
| distinct Mitre
| sort by Mitre asc

content.query:
datatable (Count:long, ['Detection Category']:string, category_count:long) [0,"Botnet Activity",1, 0,"Command and Control",2, 0,"Reconnaissance",3,
  0,"Lateral Movement",4, 0,"Exfiltration",5, 0,"Info",6, 0,"Unclassified",7]                                                                                
  |union
  (                                                                                                                                                          
  VectraDetectionsCombined   
  | where ['Last Updated'] {TimeRange}
  | extend _MitreArr = case(isnull(Mitre), dynamic([]), gettype(Mitre) in ("array", "dynamic"), Mitre, pack_array(Mitre))
  | mv-expand _MitreArr
  | extend Mitre = tostring(_MitreArr)
  | where ('*' == ('{Mitre:escapejson}') or Mitre in ({Mitre}))
  | summarize arg_max(['Last Updated'],*) by ['Detection ID']
  | extend ['Data Source Type'] = case(['Entity UID'] startswith "AWS", "AWS",
                                          ['Entity UID'] startswith "SAML", "AWS",
                                          ['Entity UID'] startswith "O365", "EntraID",
                                          ['Entity UID'] startswith "M365", "EntraID",
                                          ['Entity UID'] startswith "Azure", "Azure","Network")
  | where ('*' in ({DataSource}) or ['Data Source Type'] in ({DataSource}))
  | where ('*' in ({DetectionCategory}) or ['Detection Category'] in ({DetectionCategory})) and ('*' in ({DetectionType}) or ['Detection Name'] in
  ({DetectionType}))
  | extend ['Detection Category'] = case(['Detection Category']=="botnet" or ['Detection Category']=="botnet_activity","Botnet Activity",
                                        ['Detection Category']=="command_and_control","Command and Control",
                                        ['Detection Category']=="reconnaissance","Reconnaissance",
                                        ['Detection Category']=="lateral_movement","Lateral Movement",
                                        ['Detection Category']=="exfiltration","Exfiltration",
                                        ['Detection Category']=="info","Info",
                                        ['Detection Category']=="unclassified","Unclassified","Other")
  | extend category_count=case(['Detection Category']=="Botnet Activity",1,
                                ['Detection Category']=="Command and Control",2,
                                ['Detection Category']=="Reconnaissance",3,
                                ['Detection Category']=="Lateral Movement",4,
                                ['Detection Category']=="Exfiltration",5,
                                ['Detection Category']=="Info",6,
                                ['Detection Category']=="Unclassified",7,8)
  | summarize Count=count() by ['Detection Category'], category_count
  )
  | summarize Count=sum(Count) by ['Detection Category'], category_count
  | sort by category_count asc
content.title: Detection Category Count

content.query:
let Mitre_List = 
    VectraDetectionsCombined
    | where ['Last Updated'] {TimeRange}
    | summarize arg_max(['Last Updated'], *) by ['Detection ID']
    | extend ['Data Source Type'] = case(
        ['Entity UID'] startswith "AWS", "AWS", 
        ['Entity UID'] startswith "SAML", "AWS", 
        ['Entity UID'] startswith "O365", "EntraID", 
        ['Entity UID'] startswith "M365", "EntraID", 
        ['Entity UID'] startswith "Azure", "Azure", 
        "Network"
    )
    | where ('*' in ({DataSource}) or ['Data Source Type'] in ({DataSource}))
    | where ('*' in ({DetectionCategory}) or ['Detection Category'] in ({DetectionCategory})) and ('*' in ({DetectionType}) or ['Detection Name'] in ({DetectionType}))
    | extend _MitreArr = case(isnull(Mitre), dynamic([]), gettype(Mitre) in ("array", "dynamic"), Mitre, pack_array(Mitre))
    | mv-expand _MitreArr
    | extend Mitre = tostring(_MitreArr)
    | where ('*' == ('{Mitre:escapejson}') or Mitre in ({Mitre}))
    | summarize Mitre_Numbers = make_list(Mitre) by ['Detection ID'];
VectraDetectionsCombined
| where ['Last Updated'] {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(['Last Updated'], *) by ['Detection ID']
| extend ['Data Source Type'] = case(
    ['Entity UID'] startswith "AWS", "AWS", 
    ['Entity UID'] startswith "SAML", "AWS", 
    ['Entity UID'] startswith "O365", "EntraID", 
    ['Entity UID'] startswith "M365", "EntraID", 
    ['Entity UID'] startswith "Azure", "Azure", 
    "Network"
)
| extend ['Entity Name'] = extract("^(AWS:|SAML:|O365:|M365:|Azure:)?(.*)$", 2, ['Entity UID'])
| where ('*' in ({DataSource}) or ['Data Source Type'] in ({DataSource}))
| where ('*' in ({DetectionCategory}) or ['Detection Category'] in ({DetectionCategory})) and ('*' in ({DetectionType}) or ['Detection Name'] in ({DetectionType}))
| extend ['Detection Category'] = case(
    ['Detection Category'] == "botnet", "Botnet",
    ['Detection Category'] == "command_and_control", "Command and Control",
    ['Detection Category'] == "reconnaissance", "Reconnaissance",
    ['Detection Category'] == "lateral_movement", "Lateral Movement",
    ['Detection Category'] == "exfiltration", "Exfiltration",
    ['Detection Category'] == "botnet_activity", "Botnet Activity",
    ['Detection Category'] == "unclassified", "Unclassified",
    "Other"
)
| extend ["Source IP"] = case(isnotempty(["Source IP"]), ["Source IP"], "Not Applicable")
| join kind=inner (Mitre_List) on ['Detection ID']
| project
    ['Entity Name'],
    ['Detection Category'],
    Behavior=["Detection Name"],
    ['Vectra Pivot'],
    ['Data Source Type'],
    ['Source IP'],
    ['Last Updated'],
    ["Detection ID"],
    ['External Reference ID'],
    Mitre
| sort by ['Last Updated'] desc
content.title: Detection View

content.json: 💡 _Click on a row in the above Detection View grid to view more details_

content.query:
let Mitre_List = 
    VectraDetectionsCombined
    | where ['Last Updated'] {TimeRange}
    | summarize arg_max(['Last Updated'], *) by ['Detection ID']
    | extend ['Data Source Type'] = case(
        ['Entity UID'] startswith "AWS", "AWS", 
        ['Entity UID'] startswith "SAML", "AWS", 
        ['Entity UID'] startswith "O365", "EntraID", 
        ['Entity UID'] startswith "M365", "EntraID", 
        ['Entity UID'] startswith "Azure", "Azure", 
        "Network"
    )
    | where ('*' in ({DataSource}) or ['Data Source Type'] in ({DataSource}))
    | where ('*' in ({DetectionCategory}) or ['Detection Category'] in ({DetectionCategory})) and ('*' in ({DetectionType}) or ['Detection Name'] in ({DetectionType}))     and ["Detection ID"] == '{P_detection_id}'
    | extend _MitreArr = case(isnull(Mitre), dynamic([]), gettype(Mitre) in ("array", "dynamic"), Mitre, pack_array(Mitre))
    | mv-expand _MitreArr
    | extend Mitre = tostring(_MitreArr)
    | where ('*' == ('{Mitre:escapejson}') or Mitre in ({Mitre}))
    | summarize Mitre_Numbers = make_list(Mitre) by ['Detection ID'];
VectraDetectionsCombined
| where ['Last Updated'] {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(['Last Updated'], *) by ['Detection ID']
| extend ['Data Source Type'] = case(['Entity UID'] startswith "AWS", "AWS", 
                                        ['Entity UID'] startswith "SAML", "AWS",
                                        ['Entity UID'] startswith "O365", "EntraID",
                                        ['Entity UID'] startswith "M365", "EntraID",
                                        ['Entity UID'] startswith "Azure", "Azure","Network")
| where ('*' in ({DataSource}) or ['Data Source Type'] in ({DataSource}))
| where ('*' in ({DetectionCategory}) or ['Detection Category'] in ({DetectionCategory})) and ('*' in ({DetectionType}) or ['Detection Name'] in ({DetectionType})) and ["Detection ID"] == '{P_detection_id}'
| extend ['Detection Category'] = case(['Detection Category']=="botnet","Botnet",['Detection Category']=="command_and_control","Command and Control",['Detection Category']=="reconnaissance","Reconnaissance",['Detection Category']=="lateral_movement","Lateral Movement",['Detection Category']=="exfiltration","Exfiltration",['Detection Category'] == "botnet_activity", "Botnet Activity",['Detection Category'] == "unclassified", "Unclassified","Other")
| extend ["Source Host"] = parse_json(["Source Host"])[0]
| extend ["Grouped Details"] = parse_json(["Grouped Details"])[0]
| extend Summary = parse_json(Summary)[0]
| join kind=inner (Mitre_List) on ['Detection ID']
| project ID, ['Detection Category'], ['Is Triaged'], Behavior=["Detection Name"], ["Detection ID"], ["Vectra Pivot"], ["Entity ID"], ['Entity Pivot']=URL, ["Entity UID"], ["Last Updated"], ["Details"], Severity, ['Source IP'], ['External Reference ID'], Mitre
content.title: Selected Detection View Data

content.json: 📝 ***Refresh the web page to fetch details of recently collected events***

parameters.name: EntityType
parameters.label: Entity Type
parameters.query:
VectraLockdown
| where ["Locked Date"] {TimeRange} or ["Unlock Date"] {TimeRange}
| distinct Type
| extend cap = toupper(substring(Type,0,1)), rest_string = substring(Type,1)
| extend Captilized_type = strcat(cap,rest_string)
| distinct ['Type'], Captilized_type

content.query:
VectraLockdown
| where case('{TimeRange}' contains 'ago', ["Locked Date"] {TimeRange} or (["Unlock Date"] {TimeRange} and ["Unlock Date"] <= now()), ["Locked Date"] {TimeRange} or ["Unlock Date"] {TimeRange})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ["Entity Name"], Type, ["Locked Date"], ["Unlock Date"]
| where ('*' in ({EntityType}) or Type in ({EntityType}))
| extend current_status = case(["Locked Date"] <= now() and now() < ["Unlock Date"], "True", "False")
| where ('*' in ({EntityLocked}) or current_status in ({EntityLocked}))
| sort by ["Locked Date"] desc
| project ["Entity Name"], ["Entity Type"] = Type, ["Entity Locked"] = current_status, ["Locked By"], ["Locked Date"], ["Unlock Date"]
content.title: Lockdown View

content.json: 📝 ***Refresh the web page to fetch details of recently collected events***
